summary: Iteration 93: Complete testing of Super Fascicolo Tecnico Welder Certificate Attachment feature. Backend: 9/9 tests passed (100%). The PDF generation endpoint correctly extracts welders from fascicolo_tecnico.saldature._source_welder_id, includes FPC project welder, computes qualification status, and merges actual patentino PDF files.
critical_code_review_comments: pdf_super_fascicolo.py correctly extracts _source_welder_id from fascicolo_tecnico.saldature array (lines 610-615)
FPC project welder_id is also included in welder lookup (lines 617-621)
Qualification status computed correctly: attivo (>30 days), in_scadenza (≤30 days), scaduto (<today) (lines 636-643)
_build_cap4_welder builds a summary table of all assigned welders with status indicators (lines 451-499)
Actual patentino PDFs merged from /app/backend/uploads/welder_certs/ for valid qualifications (lines 752-767)
Empty saldature array handled gracefully with appropriate message (lines 458-462)
Smart Assign API at /api/smart-assign/welders returns welders with has_file flag based on safe_filename presence

test_credentials.note: Each test creates its own session via MongoDB - no persistent credentials needed

seed_data_creation: Tests create temporary welders with qualifications pointing to real PDF files in /app/backend/uploads/welder_certs/
context_for_next_testing_agent: Super Fascicolo Tecnico endpoint at GET /api/commesse/{cid}/fascicolo-tecnico-completo now includes Section 4.4 with welder summary table and merges patentino PDFs. Welders are sourced from: (1) fascicolo_tecnico.saldature[]._source_welder_id and (2) fpc_projects.fpc_data.welder_id. The welders collection stores qualifications with safe_filename pointing to PDF files in /app/backend/uploads/welder_certs/. Smart Assign API at /api/smart-assign/welders provides welder lookup with status indicators.

features_verified.super_fascicolo_no_welders: PASS - PDF generates correctly with empty saldature array (no crash)
features_verified.smart_assign_welders_status: PASS - API returns welders with overall_status and qualification status
features_verified.welder_cert_file_exists: PASS - Test cert files created and validated as PDF

TestSuperFascicoloWithFPCWelder (1 test) - FPC project welder inclusion
